item.title:
Fitzwilliam__: Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 8h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen

item.description:
Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 8h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 10h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 2 1 43 4 mil

What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 79 46 938 83 mil
